Script.name: shinykeep_script
Script.script:
-- shinykeep (Mudlet script start) -- Ported from mush scripts/g_shinykeep.xml
if not shinykeep then shinykeep = {} end
shinykeep.TIERS = { [1] = {"((Godly))"}, [2] = {"(Fabled)","(Divine)","(Mythical)","(Epic)","(Legendary)"}, [3] = {"(Eternal)","(Exalted)","(Majestic)","(Wondrous)","(Radiant)"}, [4] = {"(Brilliant)","(Dazzling)","(Shimmering)","(Gleaming)","(Sparkling)"}, [5] = {"(Vibrant)","(Shiny)","(Burnished)","(Enhanced)","(Polished)"}, }
local function vname(tier) return "shinykeep_include" .. tostring(tier) end
local function persistence_dir() local home = (type(getMudletHomeDir) == "function" and getMudletHomeDir() or ".") local dir = home .. "/persistence" if type(mkdir) == "function" then pcall(mkdir, dir) end if type(lfs) == "table" and type(lfs.mkdir) == "function" then pcall(lfs.mkdir, dir) end return dir end
local STATE_FILE = persistence_dir() .. "/shinykeep_state.lua" local saved_state = {} local function lua_serialize(value) local t = type(value) if t == "number" or t == "boolean" then return tostring(value) end if t == "string" then return string.format("%q", value) end if t == "table" then local out = {"{"} for k, v in pairs(value) do local key = (type(k) == "string" and k:match("^[%a_][%w_]*$")) and k or ("[" .. lua_serialize(k) .. "]") out[#out + 1] = key .. " = " .. lua_serialize(v) .. "," end out[#out + 1] = "}" return table.concat(out, " ") end return "nil" end
local function load_saved() local function resolve_table_save_refs(node, root, seen) if type(node) ~= "table" then return node end if rawget(node, 1) ~= nil and rawget(node, 2) == nil and next(node, 1) == nil and type(node[1]) == "number" and type(root[node[1]]) == "table" then return resolve_table_save_refs(root[node[1]], root, seen) end seen = seen or {} if seen[node] then return seen[node] end local out = {} seen[node] = out for k, v in pairs(node) do out[resolve_table_save_refs(k, root, seen)] = resolve_table_save_refs(v, root, seen) end return out end
local loaded = nil local ok, data = pcall(dofile, STATE_FILE) if ok and type(data) == "table" then loaded = data if type(loaded[1]) == "table" and type(loaded["showmain"]) == "nil" then loaded = resolve_table_save_refs(loaded[1], loaded, {}) end end if not loaded and type(table) == "table" and type(table.load) == "function" then local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "r") if f then f:close() local ok2, data2 = pcall(table.load, STATE_FILE) if ok2 and type(data2) == "table" then loaded = data2 end end end saved_state = type(loaded) == "table" and loaded or {} end
local function get_saved(name) return saved_state[name] end
local function set_saved(name, value) saved_state[name] = value end
local function save_saved() local f = io.open(STATE_FILE, "w") if f then f:write("return " .. lua_serialize(saved_state)) f:close() end end
local function set_default(name, default_value) if get_saved(name) == nil then set_saved(name, tostring(default_value)) return true end return false end
local function bget(name) local v = get_saved(name) return v == "1" or v == "y" or v == "Y" or v == "true" end
local function bset(name, on) set_saved(name, on and "1" or "0") save_saved() end
local function detect_tier(tag) if not tag then return nil end
local needle = tag:lower() for tier = 1, 5 do for _, prefix in ipairs(shinykeep.TIERS[tier]) do if needle == prefix:lower() then return tier, prefix end end end
return nil end
local function print_line(color, text) if color and color ~= "" then fg(color) end echo(text .. "\n") resetFormat() end
local function print_tier_status(tier) local prefixes = table.concat(shinykeep.TIERS[tier], ", ") local enabled = bget(vname(tier))
fg("gray") echo(string.format(" #%d: ", tier)) fg("gray") echo(prefixes) fg("gray") echo(" - ") if enabled then fg("LimeGreen") echo("INCLUDED") else fg("red") echo("EXCLUDED") end echo("\n") resetFormat() end
function SK_OnLootAny(tag) local tier, prefix = detect_tier(tag) if not tier or not prefix then return end
if not bget(vname(tier)) then return end
local keyword = prefix:gsub("[%(%) ]", "") if keyword == "" then return end
send("keep " .. keyword:lower()) end
function SK_Include(tier) local n = tonumber(tier) if not n or n < 1 or n > 5 then print_line("red", "[shinykeep] Usage: shinykeep include 1-5") return end
bset(vname(n), true) fg("gray"); echo(string.format("[shinykeep] Tier %d is now ", n)); fg("LimeGreen"); echo("INCLUDED\n"); resetFormat() end
function SK_Exclude(tier) local n = tonumber(tier) if not n or n < 1 or n > 5 then print_line("red", "[shinykeep] Usage: shinykeep exclude 1-5") return end
bset(vname(n), false) fg("gray"); echo(string.format("[shinykeep] Tier %d is now ", n)); fg("red"); echo("EXCLUDED\n"); resetFormat() end
function SK_Status() print_line("CornflowerBlue", "=== [shinykeep] Status Configuration ===") echo("\n") for tier = 1, 5 do print_tier_status(tier) end echo("\n") end
function SK_Help() print_line("CornflowerBlue", "=== [shinykeep] Help ===") echo("\n") print_line("gray", "* Auto-keeps items based on tier prefix.") print_line("gray", "* Sends 'keep tag' (e.g., keep shiny, keep godly).") print_line("gray", "* Defaults: include tiers 1-4, exclude tier 5.") echo("\n")
print_line("gold", "Current Tier Configuration:") for tier = 1, 5 do print_tier_status(tier) end
echo("\n") print_line("gold", "Commands:") print_line("LimeGreen", " shinykeep include 1-5") print_line("gray", " - Include this tier") print_line("red", " shinykeep exclude 1-5") print_line("gray", " - Exclude this tier") print_line("cyan", " shinykeep status") print_line("gray", " - Show current config") print_line("cyan", " shinykeep help") print_line("gray", " - Show this help") end
local function SK_Init() load_saved()
local changed = false changed = set_default(vname(1), 1) or changed changed = set_default(vname(2), 1) or changed changed = set_default(vname(3), 1) or changed changed = set_default(vname(4), 1) or changed changed = set_default(vname(5), 0) or changed
if changed then save_saved() end
print_line("gray", "[shinykeep] Mudlet script loaded. Type 'shinykeep help' for commands.") end
SK_Init()
